text: REVORYPremium booking acceleration systemSellerRevenue ViewBooking InputsActivationActivation PathLALumina Aesthetics WorkspaceChoose Your Main OfferActivatingDraftlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comLumina Aesthetics WorkspaceActivation in progress: Step 1 of 6ActivatingDraftLAccountlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comBillingSign outActivation integrityTurn six activation choices into one clear booking path.Main offer, lead entry, booking path, and value per booking are not admin fields here. They are the activation pillars REVORY Seller uses to move paid leads toward booked appointments. Once those pillars are locked, booked proof becomes visible in Booking Inputs and the revenue view closes the commercial read.Activation progress1 / 6Activation guardrailsOne clear decision per step. One booking motion. No CRM sprawl, no channel maze, no heavy ops rollout, and no extra demo detour before Seller can show booked proof and revenue clearly.Step 1Main OfferCurrent moveStep 2Lead EntryUp nextStep 3Booking PathUp nextStep 4Value Per BookingUp nextStep 5Seller VoiceUp nextStep 6ActivationUp nextStep 1 of 6Choose Your Main OfferChoose the one offer REVORY Seller should move from paid lead to booked appointment first.Commercial pillarMain offerBooking outcomeOne focused offer keeps the booking motion narrow, premium, and easier to trust.Commercial roleThe main offer anchors the workspace in the booking motion REVORY Seller is designed to accelerate.Why this changes booking performanceA narrow product feels easier to trust. One main offer tells the customer REVORY Seller is built to drive one booking outcome well instead of trying to cover every service at once.Activation guardrail 1Start with one main offer instead of spreading attention across multiple services.Activation guardrail 2Keep activation focused on what the clinic wants to book first.Activation guardrail 3Make the first choice feel confident, narrow, and low-friction.What this unlocks in SellerAfter locking the main offer, REVORY Seller connects the lead entry feeding that booking motion.InjectablesBest when the clinic wants REVORY Seller focused on a high-intent consult path with fast booking potential.Laser & SkinBest when the clinic wants one clear booking motion around laser, skin, or resurfacing demand.Body ContouringBest when the clinic wants one structured path for a premium body offer with a single booking goal.Activation readInjectables gives Seller a tighter booking story.Focus on a single main offer to enhance the booking narrative from the outset.Next moveKeep one main offer locked before expanding anything else.Main blockerSpreading attention across multiple services too early would blur the first booking motion and weaken the promise to clone one best seller.Shortest pathOne main offer -> lead entry -> one booking pathMain offerInjectablesThis is the one offer Seller will read first.Next moveLock lead entryAfter this, lead entry should stay equally narrow.Commercial gainOne of

text: REVORYPremium booking acceleration systemSellerRevenue ViewBooking InputsActivationActivation PathLALumina Aesthetics WorkspaceChoose Your Main OfferActivatingDraftlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comLumina Aesthetics WorkspaceActivation in progress: Step 1 of 6ActivatingDraftLAccountlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comBillingSign outActivation integrityTurn six activation choices into one clear booking path.Main offer, lead entry, booking path, and value per booking are not admin fields here. They are the activation pillars REVORY Seller uses to move paid leads toward booked appointments. Once those pillars are locked, booked proof becomes visible in Booking Inputs and the revenue view closes the commercial read.Activation progress2 / 6Activation guardrailsOne clear decision per step. One booking motion. No CRM sprawl, no channel maze, no heavy ops rollout, and no extra demo detour before Seller can show booked proof and revenue clearly.Step 1Main OfferLockedStep 2Lead EntryCurrent moveStep 3Booking PathUp nextStep 4Value Per BookingUp nextStep 5Seller VoiceUp nextStep 6ActivationUp nextStep 2 of 6Choose Your Lead EntryChoose where REVORY Seller should read live demand first so activation starts from real lead flow.Commercial pillarLead entryBooking outcomeChoose the cleanest path to bring live demand into Seller without turning activation into a technical project.Commercial roleThis choice tells REVORY Seller where live lead context will come from first.Why this changes booking performanceThe product only feels premium when activation starts from real demand. A clear lead entry connects Seller to the actual booking pipeline instead of a vague setup state.Activation guardrail 1Make the lead entry path obvious before the customer reaches Booking Inputs.Activation guardrail 2Keep supported input types explicit and narrow.Activation guardrail 3Position uploads as guided, not technical.What this unlocks in SellerAfter the lead entry is chosen, REVORY Seller locks the primary booking path.Appointments uploadRecommended when the workspace already has exports and wants the fastest path to booked visibility inside REVORY Seller.Client exportRecommended when the workspace wants to start from client records and make the lead base visible before the booking handoff.Guided CSV uploadFallback for exports that need one guided pass before Seller can read the booking path cleanly.Activation readLead entry is still the missing activation choice.Lead entry should stay explicit before Seller starts reading proof or support.Next moveChoose the cleanest lead entry now. Appointments upload is the fastest path when booked visits already exist.Main blockerSeller still needs one clear lead entry before booked proof can start reading like a product outcome.Shortest pathChoose lead entry -> booked proof -> revenue viewLead entryLead entry nextThis still needs one explicit choice.Booked proof pathWaiting on choiceProof waits until the entry path is explicit.Current suppo

name: channel
text: REVORYPremium booking acceleration systemSellerRevenue ViewBooking InputsActivationActivation PathLALumina Aesthetics WorkspaceChoose Your Main OfferActivatingDraftlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comLumina Aesthetics WorkspaceActivation in progress: Step 1 of 6ActivatingDraftLAccountlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comBillingSign outActivation integrityTurn six activation choices into one clear booking path.Main offer, lead entry, booking path, and value per booking are not admin fields here. They are the activation pillars REVORY Seller uses to move paid leads toward booked appointments. Once those pillars are locked, booked proof becomes visible in Booking Inputs and the revenue view closes the commercial read.Activation progress3 / 6Activation guardrailsOne clear decision per step. One booking motion. No CRM sprawl, no channel maze, no heavy ops rollout, and no extra demo detour before Seller can show booked proof and revenue clearly.Step 1Main OfferLockedStep 2Lead EntryLockedStep 3Booking PathCurrent moveStep 4Value Per BookingUp nextStep 5Seller VoiceUp nextStep 6ActivationUp nextStep 3 of 6Lock Your Booking PathSet the primary path REVORY Seller should reinforce when a lead is ready to move toward booking.Commercial pillarBooking pathBooking outcomeA single primary path keeps the booking system predictable. Email stays the default; SMS remains assisted when available.Commercial roleThis choice sets the main booking lane REVORY Seller should reinforce when a lead is ready to become a booked appointment.Why this changes booking performanceA premium self-service system removes ambiguity early. One default path makes the booking handoff explicit, cleaner to launch, and easier to trust.Activation guardrail 1Keep one primary booking lane so the motion feels predictable from day one.Activation guardrail 2Anchor Seller in a single booking path instead of multiple competing routes.Activation guardrail 3Avoid making the customer guess where REVORY Seller should hand qualified leads off for booking.What this unlocks in SellerNext, REVORY Seller sets the value tied to each booked appointment.Primary booking path (Email)Recommended default for the MVP and the clearest way to make the final handoff to booking feel simple and explicit.Assisted booking path (SMS)Useful when available in-plan, but REVORY Seller still keeps one main booking destination instead of multiple parallel lanes.Activation readEmail is the recommended default booking path.Channel selection is the right place for a short default because it keeps the handoff clear without adding extra flow.Next moveEmail stays the recommended default when you want the clearest MVP handoff from interest to booked appointment.Main blockerAdding multiple booking lanes too early would make Seller feel heavier and less trustworthy.Shortest pathLead enters -> email handoff -> booked appointmentBooking pathPrimary booking path (Email)Seller should reinforce one destination, not a route maze.Handoff qualit

name: deal_value
text: REVORYPremium booking acceleration systemSellerRevenue ViewBooking InputsActivationActivation PathLALumina Aesthetics WorkspaceChoose Your Main OfferActivatingDraftlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comLumina Aesthetics WorkspaceActivation in progress: Step 1 of 6ActivatingDraftLAccountlumina.manual.qa+20260408@example.comBillingSign outActivation integrityTurn six activation choices into one clear booking path.Main offer, lead entry, booking path, and value per booking are not admin fields here. They are the activation pillars REVORY Seller uses to move paid leads toward booked appointments. Once those pillars are locked, booked proof becomes visible in Booking Inputs and the revenue view closes the commercial read.Activation progress4 / 6Activation guardrailsOne clear decision per step. One booking motion. No CRM sprawl, no channel maze, no heavy ops rollout, and no extra demo detour before Seller can show booked proof and revenue clearly.Step 1Main OfferLockedStep 2Lead EntryLockedStep 3Booking PathLockedStep 4Value Per BookingCurrent moveStep 5Seller VoiceUp nextStep 6ActivationUp nextStep 4 of 6Set Value Per BookingSet the revenue tied to one booked appointment so REVORY Seller can read performance against money, not just activity.Commercial pillarValue per bookingBooking outcomeKeep this simple and directional. The goal is a clean revenue baseline from day one.Commercial roleThis step stores the revenue baseline tied to one booked appointment.Why this changes booking performanceSeller should feel connected to money from the first session. A clear value per booking keeps the dashboard centered on revenue instead of generic activity.Activation guardrail 1Keep this value easy to set without turning activation into a finance workflow.Activation guardrail 2Use one clear number to anchor revenue visibility from day one.Activation guardrail 3Avoid bloating the step with pricing logic or plan complexity.What this unlocks in SellerOnce value per booking is set, REVORY Seller can lock the booking voice and move to final activation.Value tied to one booked appointmentSet the value tied to one booked appointment. Keep it directional so Seller can read money clearly from day one.Activation readValue per booking is the missing revenue anchor.A short recommendation here makes Seller feel economically aware without turning activation into pricing software.Next moveSet one clean value per booking so revenue can read as a grounded outcome from the first visible appointments.Main blockerWithout one directional booking value, the revenue view stays abstract even if booked appointments appear.Shortest pathConfigured value per booking -> visible bookings -> revenue readValue per bookingValue pendingThis is the baseline REVORY uses in the revenue read.Revenue readPendingThe dashboard needs one number before it needs more math.Scope guardrailOne numberNo pricing engine, no filters, no plan calculator.This recommendation stays inside one configured value baseline. The goal is consistency without turning Seller into a copy builder.Activation guardrail 1Keep the voice choice understandable in plain language.Activation guardrail 2Treat the choice as delivery posture, not as a custom copy system.Activation guardrail 3Make the customer feel the booking path is narrow, premium, and easy to launch.What this unlocks in SellerAfter this, activation becomes a clean final review instead of another strategy pass.Calm & PremiumBest when the clinic wants a measured, polished tone in the booking path.Clear & AssertiveBest when the clinic wants a firmer, more direct booking posture.High-Touch PremiumBest when the clinic wants a more concierge-like tone without losing focus.Activation readCalm & Premium keeps Seller coherent without opening copy sprawl.A short posture recommendation belongs here without turning Seller into a writing tool.Next moveCalm & Premium works best when it reinforces the same booking path consistently instead of trying to cover every edge case in tone.Main blockerVoice choice should never turn into a custom copy builder or an open-ended brand workshop inside activation.Shortest pathOne Seller voice -> one booking motion -> one consistent handoffSeller voiceCalm & PremiumThis stays a posture choice, not a writing system.Booking motionOne tone liveVoice should support the handoff, not compete with it.Voice scopeControlledPres
